# Kadoink AIAlternatives

Looking beyond Kadoink? Try voice-first dev tools with Vapi, create a lively virtual HQ on SoWork, and replace quick calls with Async. For customer follow-ups, Quo keeps pipelines tight, while warmer networking starts on Anyone. Pick instant rings, AI voice, or calm async.

results.title: The best realtime voice AI in 2026 | Product Hunt
results.content:
## Top reviewed realtime voice AI products

Top reviewed

Across leading realtime voice tools, the market splits between developer infrastructure, speech intelligence, and meeting productivity. LiveKit and Daily.co cater to teams building low-latency voice or multimodal apps, while AssemblyAI stands out for transcription, diarization, and downstream analysis. Other products lean into translation, telephony automation, avatars, and call quality optimization."
